commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh But they like men have transgressed the covenant: there have they dealt treacherously against me. A compact was made with him, that if he continued faithful or otherwise, his posterity should be born in original justice or sin. (Haydock) He transgressed, and was expelled from paradise, as the Jews were from their land. Septuagint, "like a man: "like any who had not been so highly favoured with the law (Calmet) Adam means "a man "and sometimes it would be as well rendered in this sense.
